email_body: I cannot find where to submit a grade change after the deadline, the menu is confusing.
The login page keeps redirecting me in a loop and never reaches my dashboard.
I was told I have access to the roster but the button is greyed out for me.
Every time I export the report it downloads an empty file with no rows.
Where do I go to delegate access to my assistant? I cannot locate that setting.
The system logged me out three times while I was entering grades and I lost my work.
The deadline reminder email links to a page that says I am not authorized.
I clicked submit and got a generic error with a code I do not understand.
Searching for a student by name returns nothing even though they are enrolled.
The navigation labels changed and I can no longer find the petitions section.
My approval is stuck pending and I cannot tell who it is waiting on.
The page takes forever to load during the first week of the quarter.
